description_long: This object is an open book with a visible red spine and two pages spread apart, one of which is partially lifted as if being turned. The pages are white with dense, grayish-black printed text, giving the impression of a well-used or mid-read book. The book's cover is not visible, but the red color along the bottom edge suggests a hardcover or a colored binding. The pages appear slightly curved and uneven, adding a sense of realism and use. The book is of moderate thickness, with the text block making up the majority of its volume. There are no visible illustrations, graphics, or decorative elements on the pages or edges.
description: An open book with a red spine and white pages filled with grayish-black text, one page partially lifted as if being turned. The book appears moderately thick and well-used.
description_view_0: The book is open with one page partially lifted, showing the red spine and the text on both visible pages.
description_view_1: A direct view of the open book from the top, highlighting the full spread of text and the red spine beneath.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing the open book with a lifted page and visible text, but from a slightly different angle.
description_view_3: A rear view of the open book, focusing on the red spine and the back of the lifted page, with text visible on the far page.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is solid red with no visible text or decorative elements. It appears plain and unadorned.
